meaning: 哈拉雷[津巴布韦首都](旧称索尔兹伯里)
examples: Harare, Port Moresby and Dhaka occupied the bottom of the table.
The U.S. Congressional delegation next heads to Harare, Zimbabwe.
The main water-treatment plant serves Harare and the surrounding area.
Our correspondent Jane Standley says an atmosphere of tension in Harare has overshadowed the occasion.
England's final match of their winter tour has been abandoned due to heavy rain in Harare.
